visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) Indoor residential hallway. A woman in a blue t-shirt with yellow smiley patterns and black shorts walks through a doorway, yawns widely, and stretches her arms high. The lighting is bright and even. (2) Bathroom setting. The woman has messy hair and is seen brushing her teeth and applying skincare products. (3) Living room/dining area. She sits at a table and uses eye drops, then applies a liquid serum from a red bottle onto her face and hands. (4) Back in the hallway, she jumps excitedly toward the camera. (5) Transition to a living room with a large window. She is now wearing a white tank top and a grey hoodie set, holding a colorful polka-dot bag. She waves at the camera. (6) Close-up shot of her hand placing a small blue foil packet into the inner pocket of her bag. (7) Outside a modern building, she unlocks a door with a keypad and exits. (8) Parking garage. She approaches a black electric moped. (9) Outdoor street. She rides the moped along a road next to a park with trees and a body of water, waving one hand. (10) She arrives at a storefront with a sign that reads 'haha baby HAMU CAFE'. (11) Indoor office. She is seated at a white desk with another woman, both looking at a laptop screen. (12) Kitchen studio. A male cameraman films her as she stands behind a kitchen island with bowls of food. (13) Photo studio. She poses with a man in a pink shirt; they both smile and laugh for the camera. (14) Bedroom at night. Close-up of a smartphone timer, then shots of her sitting on a bed with 'hahababy' brand face mask boxes on a table. She applies a white face mask. (15) Close-up of a blue 'hahababy GABA' box. (16) She lies down in bed under a blanket and the light goes out. (17) Animation of a piece of white paper being crumpled into a ball against a black background.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Subtitle]: 歡迎收看. [Slogan]: 李佩潔 的一天. (2) [Slogan]: DHA+EPA. (3) [Logo]: haha baby HAMU CAFE. (4) [Variety]: 空的!. (5) [Logo]: hahababy. (6) [Slogan]: 日日B+保濕面膜. (7) [Slogan]: 夜夜C+透白面膜. (8) [Slogan]: 睡好粒 GABA.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main female creator, 1 female colleague in office, 1 male cameraman, 1 male co-star in photo shoot.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A young woman with long dark hair, wearing a blue smiley-patterned t-shirt initially, later a white tank top with a grey hoodie and shorts set.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: A modern apartment with minimalist white walls and light wood flooring; a professional photo studio with backdrops and lighting equipment; a city street with green trees and a small lake.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) Upbeat acoustic guitar rhythm starts with a moderate tempo. A male vocalist begins singing in English. The mood is cheerful and bright. (2) A sharp 'bubble' pop sound effect triggers as the woman stretches. (3) A sequence of quick percussive taps or clicks synchronized with editing cuts. (4) A metallic 'ding' sound effect when the woman jumps in the hallway. (5) Brief bike engine hum followed by a clear moped bell ring. (6) A distinct mechanical camera shutter 'click' sound during the photo shoot scene. (7) A digital notification chime or 'ding' sounds as the phone timer is shown. (8) A soft crinkling paper sound effect at the very end during the animation.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Morning Routine -> Commute/Work -> Evening Routine -> Bedtime.
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video document a day in the life of a content creator, focusing on her morning skincare, work schedule (meetings, filming, photo shoots), and evening relaxation routine. It serves as an endorsement for 'hahababy' health and beauty products, integrating them into her daily lifestyle to show their practical use and benefits.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Clear product placement of hahababy brand supplements and face masks with close-up shots of packaging.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video uses a high-energy editing style with synced sound effects to maintain viewer engagement throughout the daily routine vlog format.
